## Validation

- [ ] `python -m compileall src tests`
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `npm run build` in `webapp/` when the browser UI changes
- [ ] `npm run build` in `docs-for-repobrain/` when docs UI content changes

## Local-First Checklist

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or machine-local paths are committed
- [ ] Remote provider behavior degrades clearly when keys or SDKs are missing
- [ ] Public docs or README were updated for user-facing behavior changes
